def negative_function_accepts_mapping_protocol_but_mutates_input():
    rule_id = "function_accepts_mapping_protocol_but_mutates_input"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag functions that advertise broad mapping or sequence inputs and then mutate the received object in place."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
